nodes.name: 鹟科
nodes.summary: 鹟科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括方尾鶲、Yellow-eyed black flycatcher、Southern black flycatcher等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pale flycatcher
nodes.summary: The pale flycatcher (Agricola pallidus) is a passerine bird of the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae, native to Sub-Saharan Africa. Taxonomy The pale flycatcher was previously placed in the genus Bradornis but was moved to Melaenornis based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2010. It was subsequently moved to the genus Agricola based on a study published in 2023. Range It is widely present across Sub-Saharan Africa, although absent in the Congo Basin and Southern Africa. Habitat Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Pale flycatcher - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
